response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to distributed systems and telemetry via high-throughput services, but lacks explicit evidence of building or leading experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven growth frameworks at scale — core requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across languages (TypeScript, DLang, C++, Java) and systems
Proven track record in building scalable, high-throughput services and developer tooling
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and frameworks
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation, feature-flagging, or growth measurement platforms
Limited visibility into statistical analysis, bias detection, or rollout-risk controls for experiments
AI tool usage for engineering velocity is mentioned vaguely without concrete examples or impact
